location: Random drop from spear-wielding Marionette Soldiers, most reliably the one posted just outside Witchbane Ruins on the Weeping Peninsula (a larger cluster of six also patrols around a separate Converted Tower elsewhere).
tactics: Witchbane Ruins sits in a poison swamp south of the Fourth Church of Marika — bring poison resistance or be ready to cure it
Marionette Soldiers here also guard the cellar holding Sorceress Sellen's questline prisoner — don't let their patrol pull you into that encounter by accident if you're just farming
Drop rate is a low 2%, so the six-soldier cluster around the Converted Tower elsewhere is a denser (if less convenient) farm alternative
Their attacks mix spear jabs with a blunt swinging strike that also builds blood loss — don't underestimate them as basic mooks
lore: A spiked cylinder lashed to a long pole, built by sorcerers as a weapon for their Marionette Soldiers — swung, it deals blunt strike damage, and its spikes tear enough to draw blood.

builds.name: Strength/Dex bleed poke
builds.why: Even D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling plus built-in blood loss buildup makes it a solid budget quality-bleed spear
